name: Channel Islands (United Kingdom, de facto)
description: An informal regional emblem combining symbols of the two bailiwicks of the Channel Islands (Jersey and Guernsey).
history: There is no single official flag of the Channel Islands; each of the bailiwicks (Jersey and Guernsey) has its own flag. The shown design is a regional emblem sometimes used informally to represent the collective Crown Dependencies.

features.symbolism: an informal regional emblem combining symbols of the bailiwicks of Jersey and Guernsey
